title: Augustana Art Department Bestows Spitznagel Medal for Achievement to Three Graduating Artists
summary_en: The Augustana University Art Department has presented its highest award вАФ the Harold Spitznagel Medal for Achievement in Art вАФ to three graduating Augustana students during the opening reception of вАЬThe Augustana Senior ShowвАЭ at the Eide/Dalrymple Gallery on Friday, May 1. This marks only the second time that three individuals have been honored with the award in one year.

title: Augustana University Student Named 2026 Truman Scholar
summary_en: Augustana University student Jessalyn Wienk вАШ27 is one of 55 college students nationwide to receive the 2026 Truman Scholar Award. Wienk is the 11th Augustana student to win the award in AugustanaвАЩs history and the first honored since 2020.
title_cn: [еЊЕзњїиѓС] Augustana University Student Named 2026 Truman Scholar
